title: Elaphoglossum propinquum
taxonomy: Elaphoglossum propinquum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a part of the genus Elaphoglossum, which includes over 1,000 species of ferns. Elaphoglossum propinquum is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Elaphoglossum propinquum is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, and the phylum and class of the plant are Pteridophyta and Polypodiopsida, respectively. This classification makes Elaphoglossum propinquum a member of the vascular plant group.
